prompt:
Cinematic 16:9 LANDSCAPE frame, optimized for X / Twitter in-feed display

Visual direction:
Editorial poster illustration for the 'Team' allocation of a satirical Deep-State token — NOT a portrait. Long high-contrast corridor shot of three anonymous figures in black tailored overcoats, seen from behind, walking down an empty marble hallway lit only by a low warm amber (#F59E0B) wall-sconce halfway down. The corridor walls are lined with closed unmarked doors and a faint subtitle of Greek Delta-Sigma (ΔΣ) symbols barely engraved into the wall mouldings. The figures' silhouettes are sharp and anonymous — no faces visible, no insignia, no badges. A single thin teal (#2DD4BF) communicator wire trails discreetly from one ear, vanishing inside the collar. The marble floor reflects the amber sconce in long polished highlights. Mood: the operators, the unnamed professionals, the council that signs the orders — present, vigilant, permanently anonymous. Shot on 35mm, wide-angle, shallow depth-of-field, fine film grain, cinematic noir, very desaturated. No faces, no recognisable real-world logos, no legible text.

Narrative hook (translate this idea into a purely visual scene — DO NOT render the text itself inside the image):
"The Council — anonymous operators, never named. Black overcoats. Long marble corridor. Discreet earpieces."

ABSOLUTE RULES:
- NO visible text, NO letters, NO numbers unless they are clearly part of the Matrix code rain or the engraved Greek glyphs.
- NO watermark, NO logo, NO signature, NO AI disclaimer badge.
- NO real politician likeness, NO real brand logos.
- NO hands with more than 5 fingers.
- Palette locked to: near-black #0B0D10, Matrix green #33FF33, cyan #2DD4BF, gold #F59E0B, campaign-red #E11D48 (used sparingly).
- Photorealistic hybrid with digital-painting finish, cinematic volumetric lighting, 35mm film grain, subtle chromatic aberration.
